glosses.ja: 描写する; 説明する

translations.en: I’m describing the photo to you.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在向你描述这张照片。
translations.pt: Estou descrevendo a foto para você.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mô tả bức ảnh cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik beschrijf de foto aan je.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें इस तस्वीर का वर्णन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang mendeskripsikan foto itu kepadamu.
translations.ja: あなたに写真を説明しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) functioning as the subject of the finite verb.
Clitic personal pronoun (2nd person singular, dative) marking the indirect object/recipient of the action.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular), agreeing with the subject 'Je'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determinining the noun that follows.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'décris'.

sentences.target: Tu dois décrire tes symptômes clairement.

translations.fr: Tu dois décrire tes symptômes clairement.
translations.en: You need to describe your symptoms clearly.
translations.es: Debes describir tus síntomas con claridad.
translations.de: Du musst deine Symptome klar beschreiben.
translations.it: Devi descrivere chiaramente i tuoi sintomi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你需要清楚地描述你的症状。
translations.yue: 你要清楚咁形容你嘅症狀。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно ясно описать свои симптомы.
translations.pt: Você precisa descrever claramente seus sintomas.
translations.he: אתה צריך לתאר את התסמינים שלך בצורה ברורה.
translations.vi: Bạn cần mô tả rõ ràng các triệu chứng của mình.
translations.nl: Je moet je symptomen duidelijk beschrijven.
translations.uk: Тобі потрібно чітко описати свої симптоми.
translations.hi: तुम्हें अपने लक्षणों का स्पष्ट रूप से वर्णन करना होगा.
translations.el: Πρέπει να περιγράψεις ξεκάθαρα τα συμπτώματά σου.
translations.nb: Du må beskrive symptomene dine tydelig.
translations.id: Kamu perlu menjelaskan gejalamu dengan jelas.
translations.sv: Du behöver beskriva dina symtom tydligt.
translations.ro: Trebuie să îți descrii clar simptomele.
translations.da: Du skal beskrive dine symptomer tydeligt.
translations.ja: あなたは症状をはっきり説明する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular) functioning as the subject of 'dois'.
Lexical modal verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) expressing obligation and taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the clausal complement (xcomp) of 'dois'; head of the object 'symptômes'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, plural form) modifying 'symptômes'.
Common noun (plural) serving as the direct object of 'décrire'.
Adverb of manner modifying the predicate ('décrire' and its VP).

sentences.target: Ils décrivent la panne au mécanicien.

translations.fr: Ils décrivent la panne au mécanicien.
translations.en: They describe the breakdown to the mechanic.
translations.es: Le describen la avería al mecánico.
translations.de: Sie beschreiben dem Mechaniker die Panne.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们向修理工描述故障。
translations.yue: 佢哋向維修師傅解釋故障情況。
translations.pt: Eles descrevem a pane ao mecânico.
translations.vi: Họ mô tả sự hỏng hóc cho thợ máy.
translations.nl: Ze beschrijven de storing aan de monteur.
translations.hi: वे मैकेनिक को खराबी का वर्णन कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らは整備士に故障を説明している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural) functioning as the subject of 'décrivent'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural), agreeing with 'Ils'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determinining 'panne'.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'décrivent'.
Prepositional contraction ('à + le') introducing the indirect object phrase.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'à' (recipient of the description).

sentences.target: On décrit ce quartier aux élèves.

translations.fr: On décrit ce quartier aux élèves.
translations.en: We’re describing this neighborhood to the students.
translations.es: Les describimos este barrio a los estudiantes.
translations.de: Wir beschreiben den Schülern dieses Viertel.
translations.it: Stiamo descrivendo questo quartiere agli studenti.
translations.ko: 우리는 학생들에게 이 동네를 설명하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在向学生们描述这个街区。
translations.yue: 我哋向學生介紹呢個社區。
translations.pt: Estamos descrevendo este bairro aos alunos.
translations.he: אנחנו מתארים לתלמידים את השכונה הזאת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mô tả khu phố này cho học sinh.
translations.nl: We beschrijven deze buurt aan de leerlingen.
translations.hu: Ezt a környéket leírjuk a diákoknak.
translations.hi: हम छात्रों को इस इलाके का वर्णन कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιγράφουμε αυτή τη γειτονιά στους μαθητές.
translations.nb: Vi beskriver dette nabolaget for elevene.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendeskripsikan lingkungan ini kepada para siswa.
translations.sv: Vi beskriver det här kvarteret för eleverna.
translations.da: Vi beskriver dette kvarter for eleverne.
translations.ja: 私たちは学生たちにこの地域を説明しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun functioning as the subject of 'décrit'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with 'On'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'quartier'.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'décrit'.
Prepositional contraction ('à + les') introducing the indirect object phrase.
Common noun (plural) serving as the object of the preposition 'à' (indirect object/recipients).
